title: Responsive Steps

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Responsive Card Component
requirements
1. Create a responsive card component with a background image that resizes properly on different screen sizes.
2. The card should have a title, description, and button.
3. The title should be centered and take up most of the space, but not more than 50% of the container.
4. The description should be below the title and should wrap to the next line if it exceeds the container size.
5. The button should be centered and should have a hover effect.
6. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.

constraints: Use only HTML and CSS for the solution.
Avoid using JavaScript for this challenge.

gradingCriteria.description: The card component is responsive and resizes properly on different screen sizes
The card has a title, description, and button
The title is centered and takes up most of the space, but not more than 50% of the container
The description is below the title and wraps to the next line if it exceeds the container size
The button is centered and has a hover effect
